summary: Ukrainian forces continue to inflict heavy losses on Russian troops using FPV drones, with operators destroying 234 targets in a single day, including personnel, vehicles, and UAVs. Russian soldiers are increasingly targeted by FPV drones during assaults, with incidents including motorcycle-borne attacks and attempts to surrender being thwarted. Ukrainian EW systems appear to be disrupting Russian drone operations, with one instance involving a 15-second ultimatum to land an FPV drone. Belarusian volunteer FPV crews within Ukraine’s HUR unit have also struck Russian positions on the Zaporizhzhia axis.
